meaning: n.悉尼[雪梨](澳大利亚东南部港市,新南威尔士州首府)
examples: News Corporation was headquartered in Sydney.
Sydney is one of the world's must-see cities.
In the morning Mr. McDonald departed for Sydney.
But Sydney is keen to redress the imbalance and celebrate the resilience of Indigenous Australians.
Gift certificates to the Sydney Seafood School are available for last-minute presents as well.
